summary: First iteration. Tested backend (14 pytest cases, all PASSED) and frontend (login → dashboard → streams → sessions → stats → logs → settings → logout, all PASSED). Auth (cookie + Bearer), CRUD, toggle, duplicate-409, 404, sessions filtering by alive streams, 24-point stats series, KPIs, charts, modal, search filter, and logout all verified working.

issues: Charts render (12 SVGs) but lack `data-testid` prefix `chart-*`. Existing testids: stat-cpu, stat-mem, stat-streams, stat-bw. Review_request expected 3 chart testids — recommend adding `chart-cpu`, `chart-mem`, `chart-bw` or similar for testability.
New Stream modal works correctly but root element does not use `role="dialog"` nor data-testid. Adding `data-testid="new-stream-modal"` would aid automation.

action_items: Optional: add `data-testid="chart-*"` attributes to the 3 charts on /stats for consistent testability.
Optional: add `role="dialog"` or `data-testid="new-stream-modal"` to the Streams create modal.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:14 — bson.ObjectId is used to query user by `_id`. If a stale JWT contains an id that is not a valid ObjectId, ObjectId(payload['sub']) will raise InvalidId (bubbles up as 500). Consider catching `bson.errors.InvalidId` and returning 401.
server.py: login sets cookie with `secure=False`. For production HTTPS deployment this should be True (env-driven). Acceptable in DEMO.
server.py: uses deprecated FastAPI `@app.on_event("startup")`. Recommend migrating to lifespan handlers.
flussonic.py: `_MOCK_STREAMS` is process-wide global state — fine for demo, but `list_streams()` mutates bitrate/clients on every GET; assertions could be flaky over time. Not blocking.
seed_data_creation: None persistent — used TEST_<uuid> stream name in CRUD test and deleted at end. Backend seeds 8 mock streams + admin user on startup automatically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has full pytest coverage at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py — re-run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py -v`. Frontend testids verified: login-{email,password}-input, login-submit-button, kpi-{streams-live,clients,bandwidth,uptime}, chart-{viewers,bandwidth} (dashboard only), stat-{cpu,mem,streams,bw}, stream-toggle-*, stream-delete-*, nav-*, logout-button. Streams modal lacks a testid — use button text 'New Stream' / 'Create stream' / 'Cancel'.
